title: Simply Magnets
description: QoL mod for Minecraft 26.1 that adds 3 tier of magnets.
body:
This simple minecraft mod for 26.1 adds 3 item that are magnets (NeoForge works with Curios), one for each tier:

### ![Iron Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12cf6d1f3804efee43007fa672630478b7c36a14.png)    Iron Magnet:
Small range magnet with a low strenght made from iron.

### ![Gold Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53553245c12931084ebce062cebeaf6141d3d0cc.png)  Gold Magnet:
Medium range magnet with pretty good strenght made from gold.

### ![Diamond Magnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f6bf57016ecad0ba8927057038787478b34af11.png)  Diamond Magnet:
Best tier magnet that teleports items in your inventory instead of grabbing like the others.
It also has a filter which is configurable by shift+right click holding the magnet. [For now it only works using itemId but we'll add the Jei integration very soon]
